title: Aspect Ratio
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Aspect Ratio helper using a CSS ratio variable and cn.

examples.title: AspectRatioDemo
examples.description: Landscape image inside a 16:9 ratio box.

examples.title: AspectRatioPortrait
examples.description: Portrait image inside a 9:16 ratio box.

examples.title: AspectRatioRtl
examples.description: RTL figure with a 16:9 ratio box and Arabic caption.

examples.title: AspectRatioSquare
examples.description: Square image inside a 1:1 ratio box.

deviations.summary: Image examples use local img rendering instead of the origin Next Image runtime component.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on Next. The fixture shim and Foldkit examples preserve the rendered img element, classes, source, alt text, ratio box DOM, dimensions, and computed styles relevant to Aspect Ratio parity.
